description: Implement pay-per-video monetization with free 60-second preview, Supabase auth, and Stripe payments

userStories.title: Database Schema Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database tables to store users, preview jobs, and translation jobs so that data persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: profiles table created with id, email, tos_accepted_at, created_at
preview_jobs table created with session_id, user_id, video_url, target_language, status, preview_file_path
translation_jobs table created with user_id, preview_job_id, price_cents, stripe fields, status, output_file_path
Row Level Security (RLS) enabled on all tables
Users can only read their own records
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 1. SQL migration file: supabase_migrations/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql

userStories.title: Supabase Client Integration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Supabase Python client configured so that the backend can interact with the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Supabase client initialized with env vars (SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY)
Helper functions for CRUD operations on each table
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 2. Created db.py with full CRUD helpers. Renamed supabase/ to supabase_migrations/ to fix import conflict.

userStories.title: Video Info Extraction Endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to paste a video URL and see its title and duration before committing to a preview.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns price_quote for full translation (calculated from duration)
Handles invalid URLs with appropriate error message
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 3. Added /video-info endpoint with VideoInfoRequest/Response models and calculate_price_cents() helper.

userStories.title: Preview Job Creation
userStories.description: As a guest user, I want to start a free preview translation so I can evaluate the quality before paying.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /preview endpoint accepts video_url, target_language, session_id
Starts background task to process first 60 seconds only
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 4. Added /preview endpoint with PreviewRequest/PreviewResponse models and process_preview background task.

userStories.title: Partial Video Download (60 seconds)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to download only the first 60 seconds of a video for preview processing.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify download_video function to accept optional duration_limit parameter
Uses ffmpeg to extract only first 60 seconds
Works with all yt-dlp supported sites
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 5. Added duration_limit param to download_video(), ffmpeg trimming for video/audio, PREVIEW_DURATION_SECONDS constant.

userStories.title: Preview Processing Pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the translation pipeline to work with partial videos for preview generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Transcription, translation, TTS all work on partial audio
Preview video saved to Supabase Storage
preview_job status updated to completed with file path
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 6. Implemented full pipeline in process_preview(), added upload_preview_to_storage() and get_preview_signed_url() to db.py.

userStories.title: Preview Status Endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to check the status of my preview so I know when it's ready.
acceptanceCriteria: When completed, returns preview_url and price_quote
Guests can access by session_id match
Logged-in users can access by user_id match
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 7. Added GET /preview/{preview_id} endpoint with session_id/user_id access control.

userStories.title: Preview Video Serving
userStories.description: As a user, I want to watch my preview video so I can evaluate the translation quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Generates signed URL from Supabase Storage
Only accessible to preview owner (session_id or user_id)
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 8. Added GET /preview/{preview_id}/video endpoint with signed URL redirect.

userStories.title: User Authentication - Signup
userStories.description: As a guest, I want to create an account so I can purchase full translations.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates profile record with tos_accepted_at timestamp
Validates email format and password strength
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 9. Added /auth/signup endpoint with email/password validation, Supabase Auth signup_user(), profile creation with tos_accepted_at.

userStories.title: User Authentication - Login
userStories.description: As a returning user, I want to log in so I can access my account.
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 10. Added /auth/login endpoint with Supabase Auth sign_in_with_password().

userStories.title: User Authentication - Google OAuth
userStories.description: As a user, I want to sign in with Google for faster account creation.
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 11. Added /auth/google redirect endpoint, /auth/callback handler, get_google_oauth_url() and exchange_oauth_code() in db.py.

userStories.title: Authentication Middleware
userStories.description: As a developer, I need middleware to protect routes that require authentication.
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 12. Added verify_jwt() to db.py, CurrentUser model, get_current_user and get_current_user_optional FastAPI dependencies.

userStories.title: Stripe Checkout Session Creation
userStories.description: As a logged-in user, I want to pay for a full translation so I can get the complete video.
acceptanceCriteria: Creates Stripe Checkout Session with correct amount
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 13. Added stripe to requirements, create_stripe_checkout_session() to db.py, POST /checkout/create endpoint with auth.

userStories.title: Stripe Webhook Handler
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to handle Stripe webhooks to confirm payment and start processing.
acceptanceCriteria: On checkout.session.completed: updates translation_job payment_status to paid
On payment success: triggers full translation processing
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 14. Added POST /webhook/stripe endpoint with signature verification, checkout.session.completed handler, and process_full_translation trigger.

userStories.title: Full Translation Processing
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to process full video translations after payment confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: Reuses preview transcription for first 60 seconds if available
Updates translation_job status and output path
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 15. Full pipeline implemented: download -> transcribe -> translate -> TTS -> merge -> upload. Added upload_translation_to_storage() and get_translation_signed_url() to db.py.

userStories.title: Translation Job Status Endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to check the status of my paid translation.
acceptanceCriteria: Only returns jobs owned by current user
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 16. Added GET /jobs/{job_id} endpoint with auth, ownership verification, download_url on completion.

userStories.title: Translation Download Endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to download my completed translation.
acceptanceCriteria: Verifies job belongs to current user
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 17. Added GET /jobs/{job_id}/download endpoint with TranslationDownloadResponse model, auth, ownership verification, and 24h signed URL expiration.

userStories.title: User Jobs List Endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all my translation jobs in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /jobs returns list of user's translation jobs
Includes status, video_title, created_at, download availability
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 18. Added GET /jobs endpoint with UserJobListItem model, auth required, ordered by created_at desc.

userStories.title: IP-Based Rate Limiting
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to prevent preview abuse by limiting requests per IP.
acceptanceCriteria: Limits preview requests to 5 per hour per IP
Returns 429 Too Many Requests when exceeded
Does not affect authenticated users paid jobs
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 19. Sliding window rate limiter for /preview endpoint. Configurable via PREVIEW_RATE_LIMIT and PREVIEW_RATE_WINDOW env vars.

userStories.title: Frontend - Video Info Display
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see video details after pasting a URL.
acceptanceCriteria: Displays: thumbnail, title, duration, price quote
Verify in browser using MCP Toolkit browser tools
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 20. Added video info display with thumbnail, title, duration, price. Preview FREE button in language panel.

userStories.title: Frontend - Language Selection
userStories.description: As a user, I want to select a target language for translation.
acceptanceCriteria: Language dropdown/grid shown after video info loaded
Selection required before preview can start
Verify in browser using MCP Toolkit browser tools
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 21. Language selection was already implemented as part of US-020. Language grid with 23 languages, flag icons, amber selection highlight, and preview button state management all functional.

userStories.title: Frontend - Preview Progress
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see preview processing progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Progress bar shows current stage and percentage
Shows error message if preview fails
Verify in browser using MCP Toolkit browser tools
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 22. Added session ID generation, POST /preview API call, polling every 2 seconds, progress bar updates, and error handling.

userStories.title: Frontend - Preview Player
userStories.description: As a user, I want to watch my preview video and see the price for full translation.
acceptanceCriteria: Button triggers auth flow if not logged in
Verify in browser using MCP Toolkit browser tools
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 23. Added preview player panel with video element, 60 SEC PREVIEW badge, prominent price display, Get Full Video CTA button, and auth flow trigger (showAuthModal placeholder for US-024).

userStories.title: Frontend - Auth Modal
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create an account or log in to purchase.
acceptanceCriteria: Modal appears when Get Full Video clicked (if not logged in)
Verify in browser using MCP Toolkit browser tools
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 24. Auth modal with Google OAuth (primary), email/password form (secondary), signup/login toggle, ToS checkbox for signup, password validation, sessionStorage persistence.

userStories.title: Frontend - Checkout Redirect
userStories.description: As a logged-in user, I want to be redirected to Stripe to complete payment.
acceptanceCriteria: Get Full Video calls /checkout/create when logged in
Verify in browser using MCP Toolkit browser tools
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 25. Implemented proceedToCheckout() with /checkout/create API call, Bearer token auth, loading state, and Stripe redirect.

userStories.title: Frontend - Payment Success Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see confirmation after successful payment.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using MCP Toolkit browser tools
userStories.notes: Completed in iteration 26. Created /static/success.html with payment confirmation UI, /success route with query param passthrough, auto-redirect countdown.

userStories.title: Frontend - Job Progress View
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my full translation progress after payment.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using MCP Toolkit browser tools

userStories.title: Frontend - User Dashboard
userStories.description: As a logged-in user, I want to see all my past translations.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows: video title, language, status, date
Verify in browser using MCP Toolkit browser tools
